title: LabResult
description: A laboratory test result. Maps to SDTM domain LB (Laboratory Test Results).

lab_id.description: Unique identifier for the lab result.

lab_sequence.description: Sequence number for the lab result. CDISC LB variable: LBSEQ.

test_name.description: Name of the lab test. CDISC LB variable: LBTEST.

test_code.description: Lab test code. CDISC LB variable: LBTESTCD.

category.description: Lab test category. CDISC LB variable: LBCAT.

result.description: Test result value (numeric as string or character result). CDISC LB variable: LBORRES.

unit.description: Unit of measurement. CDISC LB variable: LBORRESU.

reference_range_low.description: Lower limit of normal reference range. CDISC LB variable: LBSTNRLO.

reference_range_high.description: Upper limit of normal reference range. CDISC LB variable: LBSTNRHI.

normal_flag.description: Normal/abnormal indicator. CDISC LB variable: LBNRIND.

specimen_type.description: Type of specimen collected. CDISC LB variable: LBSPEC.

collection_date.description: Date specimen was collected. CDISC LB variable: LBDTC.
